$comment: The console component catalog. `dart run build_runner build` projects it into console.g.dart (the typed factory registry for box/text/counter) and console.g.json (the LLM tool schema). The render root 'screen' (a typesetting Stage) is NOT a catalog type: Stage needs a runtime Sink with no wire representation, so it is hand-registered in lib/src/registry.dart and merged over these generated entries.

catalog.name: console
catalog.description: The genesis console component vocabulary: bordered boxes, text lines, and interactive counters rendered to the terminal.

box.description: A bordered container with a title. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

text.description: A single line of static text. Cannot have children.

counter.description: An interactive counter showing a label and a live integer value. Affords the press and set actions.

press.description: Increment the counter by context.amount (integer, optional; defaults to 1).

set.description: Set the counter to context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.
